calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2024 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-14-2024 Continued To Oct-16-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiff Winhall 7, Llc?S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment By Court
Off Calendar Aug-28-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for default judgment against Defendants China Oceanwide Group Limited and Oceanwide Center LLC.

Dept.505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Bailiffs: Deputy Lopes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" only to be used in compliance with California Government Code Section 69957, commencing at 9:24:34 a.m., pausing at 9:26:07 a.m., commencing at 9:27:05 a.m. and concluding at 10:02:08 a.m. (D505)

Aaron J. Ver, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff Winhall7, LLC, A Delaware Limited Liability.
Defendants China Oceanwide Group Limited and Oceanwide Center LLC not appearing.
Jeff Young, sworn to testify for the Plaintiff.

Court discusses the requirements needed to be submitted prior to this day's hearing date.
The Court inquires as to the billable hours invoice and service.
Counsel to provide a summary and provide proof as to the prayer.
The Plaintiff submits the following exhibit/s for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Complaint
Exhibit A: Guarantee
Exhibit B: Commercial Lease
Exhibit C: Assignment of Deed of Trust
Exhibit D: Assignment of rent
Exhibit E: Trustee's deed upon sale
Counsel to offer proof as to witness testimony.
Court examines witness. Witness confirms that counsel's statements are true and correct. Witness testifies.
Counsel confirms that the judgment will resolve the case.

Good cause appearing, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven its prima facie case and rules in favor of the Plaintiff against the Defendants as follows:

The Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendants:

Damages $2,737,388.88
Costs $3,951.31
Attorney's Fees $34,620.00
Pre-judgment Interest $248,240.07

Total Judgment $3,024,200.26

Proposed judgment as modified signed and executed this day.

Plaintiff Winhall 7, Llc?S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment By Court
Off Calendar Jul-31-2024 Continued To Aug-28-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:45 am and concluding at 10:14 am.

Plaintiff Winhall 7 LLC. is present represented by Aaron Ver, Esq.
Defendant China Oceanwide Group not appearing.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

JEFF YOUNG is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

The Court addresses Plaintiff's counsel regarding prejudgment intrest.
The Court cannot find that the Damages of the complaint were made certain.

The Court requires Plaintiffs counsel to file additional evidence proving damages were certain and proving hours worked for attorney's fees.

The Court continues this matter to August 28, 2024 at 9:00 am in Department 505, to allow counsel to file additional declarations and provide further evidence. (D505)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2024 Continued To Sep-11-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiff Winhall 7, Llc?S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment By Court
Off Calendar May-31-2024 Continued To Jul-31-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Maria Evangelista; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:57 am, pausing at 10:20 am, resuming at 10:26 am and concluding at 10:31 am

Plaintiff Winhall 7, LLC. is present represented by Aaron Ver, Esq.
Defendant China Oceanwide Group Limited not appearing.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

JEFF YOUNG is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff Winhall 7, LLC. and testifies.

Plaintiffs counsel requests a continuance of the matter for time to file a breaf on plaintiffs request for Interest.

Good Cause appearing the Court GRANTS Plaintiff's request for a continuance.

The Court continues the matter to July 31, 2024 at 9:00 am in Dept 505. (D505)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2024 Continued To Jun-26-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
